title: linaria decipiens
intro: Linaria decipiens, also known as self-heal, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the figwort family. It is a traditional medicinal plant that has been used to treat various health issues due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The leaves and flowers of the plant have been used to create teas, tinctures, and salves that can help to reduce stress, promote wound healing, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Linaria decipiens can also be used to soothe sore throats, calm anxiety, and boost the immune system.
